text_block_list.text:
As days go by, I remain unsure if Fuji Kiseki
should continue the Triple Crown tour or change
gears to the mile tour. Then, one morning...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Here, sip this slowly. Are you okay?

I come across Fuji Kiseki gently rubbing the back
of a younger student.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're usually so sensible and collected. It's not
like you to act so irresponsibly.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...What are you trying to say?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If something's bothering you, tell me. I'll gladly
lend you an ear.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've been pushing yourself past your limits
every morning lately, haven't you?

The younger student looks away from Fuji Kiseki's
steady gaze and begins speaking quietly.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I won't hold anything back.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're... You're lucky. You have what it takes to
conquer the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You have no idea how much it hurts to have to give up even trying to take on a race before you run it!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I wanted to run in the Japanese Derby too.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't finish running an entire 2,400
meters. My legs can't handle it.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I know that there are other great races outside of
the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I know I can choose to take on races I can handle,
like miles. But still!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I dreamed of becoming a Derby champion ever
since I was a child. I promised my family I would
become one someday!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...That's why I've been pushing myself so hard.

Her final words fall from her lips like pebbles into
a still pond, and she runs off as if she's fleeing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I didn't mean for you to see all that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm fine. Thanks for asking.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The poor thing must be feeling so stressed right
now. I'll try to find the right time to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Look at me, pretending like I know what to do. Well, stress stump, what should I do?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(I couldn't offer her a single word of comfort...
And how could I have when she sounded so
crushed?)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is a blindingly bright stage.
Everyone knows of it, yearns for it, and runs it
with all their heart and soul.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Still, just because one can't take aim for that
summit doesn't mean they lack potential. But
still...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's impossible to put into words the frustration and despair that comes from the inability to even reach for something you so achingly want.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
However, even she has a path that only she can
take.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's a path out there she can run down proudly
with her heart dancing and full belief in her
future. I know there is.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
There's always more than one path in life. You
have to broaden your view.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Set your eyes on a destination that you and only
you can reach.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(I know exactly how you felt back then, Mother.
Painfully so.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Time to make a decision, Fuji Kiseki!
A few days after that incident...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment? I want to talk to you
about something!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Remember when we talked about whether I
should continue on the Triple Crown tour or go
for the mile tour?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to add one more super important caveat to
the decision-making process!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember the student from the other
day? The pony who ran off crying, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As you're aware, a runner's distance aptitude can
be a big issue. Many even have their dreams
crushed because of it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm not well-suited for long distances either, so I
understand how she feels.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And because of that, maybe I can carry her future
too at the Japanese Derby and Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I continue with the Triple Crown tour, maybe
she too will find the courage to take on the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I take on the mile tour, maybe she'll feel better
about running mile races too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I just want to give her a beacon of hope to look
toward!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll use my miracle to abolish everyone's fear of
the future and the disappointment they feel from
having their dreams crushed!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Please, don't say it's too reckless.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As Fuji Kiseki the entertainer, I can't let even a
single tear from my ponies go unaddressed.

Her tone may be light, but the stalwart
determination in her is palpable!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The stage is set. It's time to decide which path I
should take.

This is no time to be indecisive. We must make
the decision! If we're going to do this, then it
must be...
Our next race is the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, got it! Thank you for believing in me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's arrange for a press conference right away!
We have to make sure the stands are filled when
the time comes, eh?

When Fuji Kiseki formally announces her
inaptitude for long-distance races, everyone in
the conference is shocked.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean it will be difficult for you to run in the
Japanese Derby and Kikuka Sho? Are you planning to
change your trajectory?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Guess that means the battle for the Classic Triple Crown
will be without a main star. Things are going to get
really messy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary, the main star isn't going
anywhere.

Fuji Kiseki's voice rings clear and bold over the
chaotic din.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's because I'm not geared toward longer races that I want to continue the Triple Crown tour. I'll demonstrate that these legs of mine can take on those remaining 2,400 and 3,000 meters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know this might be foolish. Even if I can manage
2,400 meters, I probably won't be much of a
threat in a 3,000-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But that's why things will be so interesting!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
People will be watching me with unblinking eyes,
wondering if I'll be able to fully complete a race
of such epic proportions!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now more than ever, I have a request for
everyone—keep your eyes on me, and don't you
dare look away!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This show, this challenge, this wager upon my
very own dignity... It's all for you, as well as a
beloved schoolmate of mine.

The details of Fuji Kiseki's press conference
spread like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the press conference? It's wild how
she's purposefully gunning for races she knows
she's not suited for.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Right? But it feels like, if anyone can succeed
even with the odds stacked against them, it's Fuji
Kiseki.

The racing world is about to get shaken up big
time! Next on our schedule is the Japanese Derby!
Our next race is the NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, okay! I won't betray your faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's arrange for a press conference right away! I
wonder how I should break the news on such a
shocking development?

When Fuji Kiseki formally announces her
inaptitude for long-distance races, everyone in
the conference is shocked.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean you're giving up on the Japanese
Derby? What a shame... I was looking forward to seeing
you there.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Guess that means the battle for the Classic Triple Crown
will be without a main star. Things are going to get
really messy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And to make up for that, I'll put on a truly
dazzling show for everyone on the mile tour!
Murmur, murmur...

Fuji Kiseki's voice rings clear and bold over the
chaotic din.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Any performance can be made interesting
depending on the actors that take the stage!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In other words, no matter the race, it's those
racing who create the spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even if a race doesn't offer great honor in victory,
our radiance will be more than enough to
enrapture the audience!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're all excited for the tale I'll create
with my journey on the mile tour!

The moment she finishes her speech, a billow of
smoke shrouds her form.
When the smoke clears, Fuji Kiseki is gone.

The details of the press conference turned magic
show spread like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the press conference where Fuji
disappeared at the end?! She said she's switching
tours!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
I did! I was surprised, but this means we'll be able
to see her true potential now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Yesss, you're so right! Ugh, I can't wait to see her
run!

The racing world is about to get shaken up big
time! Next on our schedule is the NHK Mile Cup!
